title: hieracium murorum subsp. cardiophyllum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. cardiophyllum is a lesser-known subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. cardiophyllum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
